claims.summary: The 'Factory selection' step must occur before 'Buyer's Approval' can be obtained.
After a 'Meeting Scheduled' by the Buyer, the Sales team prepares an 'Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting'.
Following a 'Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards', a 'Design Request Format' is initiated.
A 'Call/email from the buyer' leads to the creation of a 'Design Request Format'.
After an 'Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting', the Creative direction team creates a card for 'Style guides - input for designers'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

claims.summary: A 'Design Request Format' leads to 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size' by the Creative direction team.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"] --> [Rectangle: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

claims.summary: After 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size', a 'Brief' is created by the Creative direction team.
A 'Brief' is followed by a 'Debriefing' by the Creative direction team.
After 'Debriefing', 'Design in Progress' is initiated by Creative designers.
'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction leads to 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical designers.
'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction also leads to 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration' by Creative designers.
After 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical designers, the next step is to 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

claims.summary: After 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration' by Creative designers, the next step is to 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

claims.summary: After 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code', 'RFQ to Factories' is sent by Sourcing.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [Rectangle: "RFQ to Factories"]

claims.summary: After 'RFQ to Factories' is sent, 'Details and Limitations' are provided by the Factories.
After 'Details and Limitations' are provided by Factories, Sourcing proceeds to 'Asking the factories about limitations'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Details and Limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"]

claims.summary: After 'Asking the factories about limitations', Sourcing must 'Provide details in Click Up'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"]

claims.summary: After the 'Price' is established, Carlos is responsible for 'SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)'.
After 'Create card: Style guides - input for designers', Creative designers perform 'Assets/ compositions selection'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [Rectangle: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

claims.summary: After 'Assets/ compositions selection', Creative designers perform 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration'.
After 'Design in Progress', Creative designers update the 'DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Design in Progress"] --> [Rectangle: "DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT"]

claims.summary: After updating the 'DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT', Creative designers prepare 'Art files in the right format + Packaging'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT"] --> [Rectangle: "Art files in the right format + Packaging"]

claims.summary: After preparing 'Art files in the right format + Packaging', Technical designers perform 'Tech Packing'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Art files in the right format + Packaging"] --> [Rectangle: "Tech Packing"]

claims.summary: After 'Tech Packing', 'Tech Pack Approval' is required by Creative direction.
After 'Tech Pack Approval', 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization' is required by Creative direction.
After 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization', the 'Licensor's comment' is received by Creative direction.
After a 'Tech Pack Update', the process returns to 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization'.
After 'Revisions implementation', the process returns to 'Design in Progress'.
After 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization', the Licensing Team performs 'Concept Submit to Licensor'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

claims.summary: After 'Concept Submit to Licensor', the Licensor may request 'Concept Revisions'.
After 'Concept Revisions', the Licensing Team must 'Resubmit' the concept.
After 'Resubmit', the concept goes back to 'Concept Submit to Licensor'.
After 'Concept Revisions', the Licensor may provide 'Concept Approved w comments'.
After 'Concept Approved w comments' from the Licensor, the Licensing Team performs 'Comments approval'.
After 'Comments approval' by the Licensing Team, the concept is 'Concept Approved' by the Licensor.
After a concept is 'Concept Approved', Carlos is responsible for 'SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)'.
After 'SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)', Carlos uploads the 'Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"]

claims.summary: After uploading the 'Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp', Production must 'Include in Task List'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"] --> [Rectangle: "Include in Task List"]

claims.summary: After Production 'Include in Task List', they initiate 'Samples Order / TechPack request'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Include in Task List"] --> [Rectangle: "Samples Order / TechPack request"]

claims.summary: After 'Samples Order / TechPack request', Technical designers prepare 'Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Samples Order / TechPack request"] --> [Rectangle: "Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal"]

claims.summary: After preparing 'Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal', a 'PPS Audit' is conducted by Technical designers.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal"] --> [Rectangle: "PPS Audit"]

claims.summary: After a 'PPS Audit', Gina must 'Review Audit and send to factory'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "PPS Audit"] --> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"]

claims.summary: After 'Re-sampling' by Factories, the process returns to 'Sampling' by Factories.
After 'Sampling' by Factories, a 'PPS Audit' is conducted by Technical designers.
After 'PPS Submit to licensor', the Licensor provides 'PPS Approved'.
After 'PPS Approved' by the Licensor, Carlos handles 'Samples shipped to US'.
After 'Samples shipped to US', Creative direction performs 'Samples Internal Approval'.
After 'Samples Internal Approval', the Buyer provides 'Samples Buyer's approval'.
After 'Samples Buyer's approval', the 'Buyer places an order'.
After a 'Production order', Factories proceed to 'Mass Production'.
After 'Professional Photos', 'Professional Photos Approval' is required by Technical designers.
After 'Professional Photos Approval', Carlos handles 'Ship to US'.
For 'Existing Items', 'Ship to US' is the final step.
After 'Buyer's Approval', Sales sends 'Picks confirmation to PM'.
After 'Picks confirmation to PM', the process returns to 'Buyer's Approval'.
For a 'Customer Refresh', the process starts with 'Debriefing'.
'Before an Order' is placed, 'Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal' are prepared by Technical designers.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Before an Order"] --> [Rectangle: "Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal"]

claims.summary: If the product is an 'Existing Product', the 'Debriefing' leads to 'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction.
If the product is a 'New Product Type', the 'Debriefing' leads to 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical designers.
If Sales confirms the buyer approves the Price, then the 'Price' is established by the Factories.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"] --(If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price)--> [Rectangle: "Price"]

claims.summary: If the 'Licensor's comment' is about a 'legal line or packaging', a 'Tech Pack Update' is performed by Technical designers.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Licensor's comment"] --(If comment is legal line or packaging)--> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Update"]

claims.summary: If the 'Audit: Fail', then 'Re-sampling' is required by the Factories.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Fail)--> [Rectangle: "Re-sampling"]

claims.summary: If the 'Audit: Pass', then the Licensing Team performs 'PPS Submit to licensor'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Pass)--> [Rectangle: "PPS Submit to licensor"]

claims.summary: If the buyer places an order 'With an Order', then Carlos initiates a 'Production order'.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Buyer places an order"] --(With an Order)--> [Rectangle: "Production order"]

claims.summary: For 'existing products' in 'Mass Production', the next step is to 'Ship to US'.
For 'New Items' in 'Mass Production', Carlos handles 'Professional Photos'.
After a meeting with the buyer or review of trendboards, a Design Request Format is generated.
A call or email from the buyer leads to the generation of a Design Request Format.
An Agenda template/Kick off Meeting leads to the creation of a card for Style guides, which serves as input for designers.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

claims.summary: The Design Request Format is used to create pre-brief design notes and confirm sizing.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"] --> [Rectangle: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

claims.summary: Pre-brief design notes and size confirmation lead to the creation of a design brief.
A design brief is followed by a debriefing session.
For existing products, the debriefing leads to costing sheets approval.
For new product types, the debriefing leads to costing sheets elaboration.
The debriefing stage initiates the 'Design in Progress' phase.
Costing sheets approval leads to costing sheets elaboration.
Costing sheets approval also leads to costing sheets/tech pack elaboration.
Costing sheets elaboration results in uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

claims.summary: Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration results in uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

claims.summary: Uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code leads to sending an RFQ to factories.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [Rectangle: "RFQ to Factories"]

claims.summary: Sending an RFQ to factories results in receiving details and limitations from the factories.
The 'Details and Limitations' received from factories prompt the sourcing team to ask factories about limitations.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Details and Limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"]

claims.summary: After asking factories about limitations, the sourcing team provides details in Click Up.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"]

claims.summary: If Sales confirms the buyer approves the price, the price information is then used.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"] --(If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price)--> [Rectangle: "Price"]

claims.summary: The approved price leads to the creation of SKUs in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp.
The creation of a style guide card for designers leads to the selection of assets and compositions.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [Rectangle: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

claims.summary: Asset and composition selection leads to costing sheets/tech pack elaboration.
The 'Design in Progress' stage leads to updating the DFlow Library and adding a reference number in the PPT.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Design in Progress"] --> [Rectangle: "DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT"]

claims.summary: Tech packing is followed by tech pack approval.
Tech pack approval leads to tech pack submit authorization.
Tech pack submit authorization leads to licensor's comment.
A tech pack update requires another tech pack submit authorization.
Revisions implementation leads back to the 'Design in Progress' stage.
Tech pack submit authorization leads to concept submission to the licensor.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

claims.summary: Concept submission to the licensor can result in concept revisions.
Concept revisions require a resubmission.
A resubmission goes back to the 'Concept Submit to Licensor' stage.
Concept revisions can lead to a 'Concept Approved w comments' status.
A 'Concept Approved w comments' status requires comments approval.
Comments approval leads to the 'Concept Approved' status.
A 'Concept Approved' status leads to SKU creation in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp.
SKU creation in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp leads to uploading the concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"]

claims.summary: A PPS Audit leads to reviewing the audit and sending it to the factory.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "PPS Audit"] --> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"]

claims.summary: If an audit fails, re-sampling is required.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Fail)--> [Rectangle: "Re-sampling"]

claims.summary: If an audit passes, the PPS is submitted to the licensor.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Pass)--> [Rectangle: "PPS Submit to licensor"]

claims.summary: Re-sampling leads to sampling.
Sampling leads to a PPS Audit.
Submitting the PPS to the licensor leads to PPS approval.
PPS approval leads to samples being shipped to the US.
Samples shipped to the US undergo internal approval.
Internal samples approval leads to buyer's approval of samples.
Buyer's approval of samples leads to the buyer placing an order.
If an order is placed, it leads to a production order.

evidence.exactQuote: [Rectangle: "Buyer places an order"] --(With an Order)--> [Rectangle: "Production order"]

claims.summary: A production order leads to mass production.
For existing products, mass production leads to shipping to the US.
For new items, mass production leads to professional photos.
Professional photos require professional photos approval.
Professional photos approval leads to shipping to the US.
Buyer's approval leads to picks confirmation to the Project Manager.
Picks confirmation to the Project Manager leads back to Buyer's Approval.
The 'For Customer Refresh' process leads to debriefing.
For existing items, shipping to the US marks the end of the process.
